title: Le Grand Vide
overview: Elliot, a retired alcoholic, embarks on a desperate quest to find his son who has been missing for two decades. During his trip to French America he will meet Bourk, an Acadian with whom he will form an unlikely friendship.

trailers.title: Le grand vide | Un film de Jessy Dupont | Au cinéma le 20 septembre
